items.text: The GCAS_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component maintains a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: The GCAS_singleton component defines the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component defines the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component defines the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: The GCAS_singleton component invokes the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component invokes the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component invokes the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable

items.text: The GCAS_singleton component sets the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7
items.fragment: The GCAS_singleton component sets the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7
items.requirement_fragment: The GCAS_singleton component sets the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7

items.text: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the computed height shall always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.fragment: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the computed height shall always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.requirement_fragment: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the computed height shall always be greater than minHeightAllowed

items.text: When simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the current height shall be greater than the previous height to indicate a pull-up trend
